channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HFIL] Himalaya Food International Ltd: Board Meeting Approves Share Capital Increase, Appoints New Auditor, and More
item.description:
Himalaya Food International Ltd's Board Meeting, held on 7th April 2026, approved several key items. The company increased its authorized share capital, appointed M/S Kumar Rupak & Associates as the new statutory auditor, and received final sanctions for a One Time Settlement (OTS) of ₹43 Crores. The board also ratified the release of ₹21.50 Crores to consortium banks and enabled provisions for raising funds. A formal Notice of Dispute was issued to Simplot regarding the non-return of machinery. An Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) was convened, and the appointment of a scrutinizer for the voting process was approved.

  • Increase in the Authorised Share Capital of the Company
  • Appointment of M/S Kumar Rupak & Associates as Statutory Auditor
  • Final sanctions received for concluding the One Time Settlement (OTS) of ₹43 Crores
  • Enabling provisions for raising of funds
  • Formal Notice of Dispute issued to Simplot regarding the non-return of machinery

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Himalaya Food International Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JSL] Jindal Stainless Announces Ranveer Singh as First-Ever Brand Ambassador
item.description:
Jindal Stainless, a leading stainless steel manufacturer in India, has announced Ranveer Singh, a celebrated actor and cultural icon, as its first-ever brand ambassador. The association aims to expand brand visibility, strengthen connect with consumers, and reinforce stainless steel's position as a trusted material. Known for his grit, performance, and reliability, Ranveer Singh's persona mirrors the brand's core ethos. He will lead campaigns across television, digital, and social media.

  • Ranveer Singh announced as first-ever brand ambassador for Jindal Stainless
  • Association aims to expand brand visibility and strengthen connect with consumers
  • Ranveer Singh to lead campaigns across television, digital, and social media
  • Stainless steel's position as a trusted material to be reinforced
  • Ranveer Singh's persona mirrors Jindal Stainless's core ethos

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL STAINLESS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [REGAL] Regal Entertainment Confirms Rights Issue Applications from Specific Investor
item.description:
Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd. has confirmed the details of applications received from a Specific Investor for participation in the Rights Issue. The Specific Investor, Northern Lights Ventures Private Limited, applied for 7,20,000 shares, which is the same as the number of RE declared as a specific investor. The application was submitted before 11 A.M. on the Issue Opening Date, April 07, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 77B(2) of the SEBI ICDR Regulations.

  • Regal Entertainment confirms receipt of application from a Specific Investor for the Rights Issue.
  • The Specific Investor, Northern Lights Ventures Private Limited, applied for 7,20,000 shares.
  • The number of shares applied for is equal to the number of RE declared as a specific investor.
  • The application was submitted before the Issue Opening Date deadline.
  • The application is in compliance with Regulation 77B(2) of the SEBI ICDR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [KALLAM] Union Bank of India Initiates Insolvency Proceedings Against Kallam Textiles Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Union Bank of India has initiated insolvency proceedings against Kallam Textiles Ltd under Section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The National Company Law Tribunal, Amaravati Bench, has admitted the petition. The IRP is appointed. The default amount is Rs.2,10,49,16,990.77 as on 31.10.2025.

  • Union Bank of India has initiated insolvency proceedings against Kallam Textiles Ltd.
  • The National Company Law Tribunal, Amaravati Bench, has admitted the petition.
  • The IRP is appointed for the case.
  • The default amount is Rs.2,10,49,16,990.77 as on 31.10.2025.
  • The case is under the territorial jurisdiction of the Amaravati Bench of the National Company Law Tribunal.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kallam Textiles Ltd-$ | Category: Insolvency

item.title: [INTLCONV*] International Conveyors Ltd: IGE India Pvt Ltd Sells 24,15,000 Equity Shares to Amaranth Daksha Private Limited
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from I.G.E. (India) Private Limited. The disclosure pertains to the sale of 24,15,000 equity shares of International Conveyors Limited to Amaranth Daksha Private Limited through an off-market transaction. The transaction will result in a 3.79% change in the total share capital of International Conveyors Limited.

  • I.G.E. (India) Private Limited sells 24,15,000 equity shares of International Conveyors Limited to Amaranth Daksha Private Limited.
  • The transaction is an off-market sale.
  • The sale represents a 3.79% change in the total share capital of International Conveyors Limited.
  • The transaction is in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The shares were sold at a price not specified in the disclosure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INTERNATIONAL CONVEYORS LTD. | Category: Sale of Shares

item.title: [POWERICA] SBI Mutual Fund Acquires 57,92,485 Shares of Powerica Ltd, Resulting in 4.5772% Voting Rights
item.description:
SBI Mutual Fund, under its various schemes including Investment Strategy under Magnum SIF, has acquired 57,92,485 shares of Powerica Ltd on April 02, 2026. This acquisition has resulted in SBI Mutual Fund holding 4.5772% of the voting rights in the company. The acquisition was made through an Initial Public Offer. The total share capital of the company after the acquisition is Rs. 63,27,59,385 consisting of 12,65,51,877 equity shares having a face value of Rs. 5/- each.

  • SBI Mutual Fund acquires 57,92,485 shares of Powerica Ltd
  • Acquisition results in 4.5772% voting rights
  • Acquisition made through Initial Public Offer
  • Total share capital of the company after the acquisition is Rs. 63,27,59,385
  • 12,65,51,877 equity shares having a face value of Rs. 5/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Powerica Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [INTLCONV*] Amarnath Daksha Pvt Ltd Acquires 24,15,000 Shares of International Conveyors Ltd from I.G.E. (India) Private Limited
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Amaranth Daksha Private Limited. The company has purchased 24,15,000 equity shares of International Conveyors Ltd from I.G.E. (India) Private Limited through an off-market transaction. This acquisition increases Amaranth Daksha Private Limited's holding to 3.79% of the total share/voting capital of International Conveyors Ltd.

  • Amarnath Daksha Pvt Ltd has acquired 24,15,000 equity shares of International Conveyors Ltd from I.G.E. (India) Private Limited.
  • The transaction was conducted off-market.
  • This acquisition increases Amaranth Daksha Private Limited's holding to 3.79% of the total share/voting capital of International Conveyors Ltd.
  • International Conveyors Ltd shares are listed on BSE Limited and The National Stock Exchange of India Limited.
  • Amaranth Daksha Private Limited is a Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company of the Seller, I.G.E. (India) Private Limited, and both are deemed to be part of the Promoter group of the Target Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INTERNATIONAL CONVEYORS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SIMRAN] Simran Farms Ltd Allots 6,18,300 Shares to Promoters Upon Conversion of Warrants
item.description:
Simran Farms Limited has allotted 6,18,300 equity shares to promoters and promoter group upon conversion of warrants. The conversion was effected pursuant to the payment of the remaining consideration amounting to Rs. 7,18,77,375/- under the preferential issue. The disclosure is made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Simran Farms Ltd has allotted 6,18,300 equity shares to promoters and promoter group.
  • The allotment was made upon conversion of 6,18,300 warrants.
  • The conversion was effected pursuant to the payment of Rs. 7,18,77,375/- under the preferential issue.
  • The disclosure is made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The equity share capital of the company has increased to Rs. 4,81,00,000/- divided into 4810000 equity shares of Rs.10/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIMRAN FARMS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SONACOMS] Sona Comstar Achieves Significant Production Milestones: 500 Million Differential Gears and 10 Million Differential Assemblies
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd. (Sona Comstar), a leading global provider of mobility technology solutions, has successfully manufactured 500 million differential gears and 10 million differential assemblies since its inception. This achievement marks another important milestone in the company's journey and reinforces its position as a key global driveline solutions provider. Sona Comstar designs and manufactures differential assemblies, precision-forged differential gears, and other driveline components for various types of vehicles. The company has been growing its global market share and has been expanding its manufacturing capabilities over the years.

  • Sona Comstar has manufactured 500 million differential gears since its inception.
  • The company has also manufactured 10 million differential assemblies since its inception.
  • Sona Comstar is a leading global manufacturer of differential assemblies for Battery Electric Vehicles (BEVs).
  • The company has been expanding its manufacturing capabilities and strengthening its position as a trusted supplier of high-precision driveline components.
  • Sona Comstar held an estimated 8.7% global market share in differential gears in CY25.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [SKMEGGPROD] SKM Egg Products: No Bird Flu Incidents in Tamil Nadu Farms, Operations Uninterrupted
item.description:
SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd. has confirmed that there are no bird flu incidents in their poultry farms located in Tamil Nadu. The company does not have any operations in Kerala where avian influenza cases were previously reported. SKM Egg Products continues to enforce strict biosecurity protocols and monitor the situation closely to ensure the safety and continuity of their operations.

  • No bird flu incidents in SKM Egg Products' Tamil Nadu farms.
  • Company does not have any operations in Kerala where avian influenza cases were reported.
  • Strict biosecurity protocols are enforced in SKM Egg Products' poultry farms.
  • Regular surveillance and monitoring are maintained to prevent avian influenza, Newcastle disease, and salmonella.
  • Egg production activities continue uninterrupted without threats or operational disruptions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKM EGG PRODUCTS EXPORT (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Monthly Update
